params.name: add-core-filters
params.description: Set to true to exclude incomplete identities and uncorrelated accounts from the results.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return. Maximum value is 250.

params.name: offset
params.description: Offset into the full result set. Usually specified with limit to paginate through the results.

params.name: count
params.description: If true, the total count of items in the full result set is included in the X-Total-Count response header. Only items in the current page are returned. Requesting a count can decrease performance.

params.name: filters
params.description: Filter results using the standard syntax described in V3 API Standard Collection Parameters. Filtering is supported for the following fields and operators: id (eq, in), name (eq, sw, co), alias (eq, sw, co), email (eq, sw, co), status (eq).

params.name: sorters
params.description: Sort results using the standard syntax. Sorting is supported for the following fields: name, alias, email.

items.docs: Get a list of public identities. This endpoint returns a paged list of public identity objects that can be filtered and sorted.

params.name: id
params.description: The identity ID.

items.docs: Get the details of a public identity by its ID.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return. Maximum value is 250.

params.name: offset
params.description: Offset into the full result set. Usually specified with limit to paginate through the results.

params.name: count
params.description: If true, the total count of items in the full result set is included in the X-Total-Count response header. Only items in the current page are returned. Requesting a count can decrease performance.

params.name: filters
params.description: Filter results using the standard syntax. Filtering is supported for the following fields: id (eq, in), name (eq, sw), priority (eq, gt, lt, ge, le).

params.name: sorters
params.description: Sort results using the standard syntax. Sorting is supported for the following fields: name, priority, created, modified.

items.docs: Get a list of identity profiles. Identity profiles define how identity attributes are mapped from source account attributes and configure lifecycle states.
Create an identity profile. An identity profile defines the mapping between source account attributes and identity attributes and configures lifecycle states for identities.

params.name: identity-profile-id
params.description: The identity profile ID.

items.docs: Get the details of an identity profile by its ID.

params.name: identity-profile-id
params.description: The identity profile ID.

items.docs: Update an existing identity profile using a JSON Patch document.

params.name: identity-profile-id
params.description: The identity profile ID.

items.docs: Delete an identity profile by its ID.

params.name: for-subadmin
params.description: Filters the returned list according to what is visible to the indicated ROLE_SUBADMIN or SOURCE_SUBADMIN identity. The value is either an identity ID or the special value 'me' for the calling identity's ID.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return. Maximum value is 250.

params.name: offset
params.description: Offset into the full result set. Usually specified with limit to paginate through the results.

params.name: count
params.description: If true, the total count of items in the full result set is included in the X-Total-Count response header. Only items in the current page are returned. Requesting a count can decrease performance.

params.name: filters
params.description: Filter results using the standard syntax. Filtering is supported for the following fields and operators: id (eq, in), name (eq, sw), created (gt, ge, le), modified (gt, lt, ge, le), owner.id (eq, in), requestable (eq), source.id (eq, in). Supported composite operators are 'and' and 'or'.

params.name: sorters
params.description: Sort results using the standard syntax. Sorting is supported for the following fields: name, created, modified.

params.name: for-segment-ids
params.description: Filters access profiles to only those assigned to the segment(s) with the specified IDs. If segmentation is unavailable, specifying this parameter results in an error.

params.name: include-unsegmented
params.description: Indicates whether the response should include unsegmented access profiles. If for-segment-ids is absent or empty, specifying this as false results in an error.

items.docs: Get a list of access profiles. When you filter for access profiles that have the '+' symbol in their names, the response is blank.

Create an access profile. A user with ROLE_SUBADMIN or SOURCE_SUBADMIN authority must be associated with the access profile's source. The maximum supported length for the description field is 2000 characters.

params.name: id
params.description: The access profile ID.

items.docs: Get an access profile by its ID.

params.name: id
params.description: The access profile ID.

items.docs: Update an existing access profile using a JSON Patch document. The maximum supported length for the description field is 2000 characters.

params.name: id
params.description: The access profile ID.

items.docs: Delete an existing access profile by its ID. The access profile must not be in use by any roles.

params.name: id
params.description: The access profile ID.

params.description: Maximum number of results to return. Maximum value is 250.

params.name: count
params.description: If true, the total count of items in the full result set is included in the X-Total-Count response header. Only items in the current page are returned. Requesting a count can decrease performance.

params.name: filters
params.description: Filter results using the standard syntax. Filtering is supported for the following fields: name (eq, sw).

params.name: sorters
params.description: Sort results using the standard syntax. Sorting is supported for the following fields: name, created, modified.

items.docs: Get a list of entitlements associated with the specified access profile.
Delete one or more access profiles in a single request. The access profiles must not be in use by any roles or applications. Returns details about which profiles were deleted and which failed.

params.name: for-subadmin
params.description: Filters the returned list according to what is visible to the indicated ROLE_SUBADMIN identity. The value is either an identity ID or 'me' for the calling identity.

params.name: sorters
params.description: Sort results using the standard syntax. Sorting is supported for the following fields: name, created, modified.

params.name: for-segment-ids
params.description: Filters roles to only those assigned to the segment(s) with the specified IDs.

params.name: include-unsegmented
params.description: Indicates whether the response should include unsegmented roles.

items.docs: Get a paged list of roles. Roles represent the broadest level of access and group one or more access profiles.
Create a role. The maximum supported length for the description field is 2000 characters. ROLE_SUBADMIN users cannot create roles with access profiles from sources outside their authorization scope.

params.name: id
params.description: The role ID.

items.docs: Get a role by its ID.

params.name: id
params.description: The role ID.

items.docs: Get a list of identity campaign certifications for the current user. A token with ORG_ADMIN, CERT_ADMIN, or REPORT_ADMIN authority is required to call this API. Callers with CERT_ADMIN authority can only see certifications they own. Callers with REPORT_ADMIN or ORG_ADMIN authority can see all certifications.

params.name: id
params.description: The certification ID.

items.docs: Get the details of an identity certification by its ID.

params.description: The certification ID.

params.name: sorters
params.description: Sort results using the standard syntax. Sorting is supported for the following fields: name, type, status.

items.docs: Get a list of access review items for the specified certification. These items represent the access that is being reviewed and may be approved, revoked, or reassigned.

params.name: id
params.description: The certification ID.

items.docs: Submit an approval, revocation, or acknowledgment decision for one or more access items in the specified certification.

params.name: id
params.description: The certification ID.

items.docs: Reassign one or more identities or access items in the specified certification to a different reviewer.

params.name: id
params.description: The certification ID.

items.docs: Sign off on a certification by its ID, finalizing all decisions. Once signed off, the certification is considered complete and all approved and revoked decisions will be processed.

params.description: The certification ID.
